results.question: What is the core theme for this year?
results.conclusion: Knowledge will be memoized, methods will become skills, work will be looped, and products will become RaaS (Result as a Service), with agents directly delivering results.

results.question: What are the key future events for Bitcoin?
results.conclusion: BTC halving will occur in April 2024, family offices and wealth managers will allocate to BTC ETFs by June 2024, sovereign wealth funds will start allocating to ETFs at an unknown time, and central banks will accumulate BTC as digital gold at an unknown time.
